configurations.name: 🚀 Development
configurations.command: . ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; DEV_HOST=${DEV_HOST:-127.0.0.1}; DEV_PHP_PORT=${DEV_PHP_PORT:-8000}; open -na "Google Chrome" --args --incognito --new-window "http://$DEV_HOST:$DEV_PHP_PORT/panel" "http://$DEV_HOST:$DEV_PHP_PORT/"; while :; do sleep 3600; done

configurations.name: 🏗️ Dev Build
configurations.command: . ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; DEV_HOST=${DEV_HOST:-127.0.0.1}; DEV_PHP_PORT=${DEV_PHP_PORT:-8000}; open -na "Google Chrome" --args --incognito --new-window "http://$DEV_HOST:$DEV_PHP_PORT/"; while :; do sleep 3600; done
